# 💬 Support & Troubleshooting

Welcome to the CachyOS Workstation Setup community! If you need help, encounter a bug, or have a feature request, here is how you can get support.

## 🔍 First Steps: The Interactive Guide

Before opening an issue, please check the built-in documentation. Open your terminal and run:

```bash
guide
```

This will launch a searchable, bilingual (EN/ID) reference containing over 160 entries on how to use every tool included in this setup.

## 🚑 Diagnosing Issues Automatically

If something breaks after a system update (e.g., Waybar disappears, or Hyprland won't launch), use the built-in diagnostic tool. Press `Super+X` and select **System Health Check**, or run:

```bash
health-check
```

The doctor will analyze your system and often provide the exact command needed to fix the issue.

## 🐛 Reporting Bugs

If you've found a bug that wasn't solved by the `health-check` or by restoring a snapshot via `config-rollback`:

1. Check the [Issues](https://github.com/anantaarthasejahtera/CachyOS-Workstation-Setup/issues) tab to see if it has already been reported.
2. If not, open a **New Issue** using the `Bug Report` template.
3. Please include your `~/cachy-setup.log` file, as it contains critical debugging information.

## 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea for a new module, a new theme, or an AI enhancement?
- Open a **New Issue** using the `Feature Request` template.
- Describe the feature, why it is useful, and how it fits into the existing ecosystem.

## 💬 Community Discussions

For general questions, showing off your customized setups, or asking for advice on workflow:
- Join the discussion in the [Discussions](https://github.com/anantaarthasejahtera/CachyOS-Workstation-Setup/discussions) tab.
- This is the best place to ask "How do I do X?" questions that aren't strictly bugs.

## 🔒 Security Vulnerabilities

If you discover a security vulnerability (e.g., a script executing arbitrary malicious code or a credential leak), **please do not open a public issue.** 

Refer to our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md) for instructions on how to securely report the issue to our team.

---

*Thank you for being part of the ecosystem!* 🚀
